title: Lamb and Veggie Kebabs
description: A flavorful and healthy vegan kebab recipe featuring marinated lamb, crunchy vegetables and a hint of Algerian spice.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a vegan lamb alternative.

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Algerian spice blend, and a pinch of salt.
Add the lamb to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated lamb, onion, bell pepper, and tomato onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Meanwhile, toast the almonds in a small skillet over medium heat until fragrant.
Garnish the kebabs with toasted almonds and fresh parsley.
